name: import_project
description: Copy a local folder into workspace/ for development. Use this when the user asks to 'import', 'pull in', 'open', or 'bring in' a project from a local path.

source_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the local folder to import (e.g. /home/user/myproject or ~/projects/game)

destination_name.description: Name for the project folder inside workspace/ (defaults to the source folder name)

overwrite.description: If true, replace the destination folder if it already exists. Default is false.

name: scan_folder
description: List the contents of any local folder to inspect a project before importing it.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the folder to scan

max_depth.description: How many directory levels to recurse (default 2)
